user_story: As an HR admin, I want to enable comp off, so that employees can earn and avail compensatory time off
acceptance_criteria: Given I am on the Comp Off screen; When I set "Enable comp off?" to Yes and Save; Then the comp off feature is enabled

user_story: As an HR admin, I want to add a new comp off settings template, so that comp off rules can be tailored by employee class
acceptance_criteria: Given I am on the Comp Off screen; When I click Add new comp off settings and define a template name, employee class specificity and minimum hours to avail comp off beyond business hours; Then the settings template is saved and listed

user_story: As an HR admin, I want to view comp off settings with template name, class specificity, minimum hours and applicability, so that I can review comp off policies
acceptance_criteria: Given comp off settings exist; When I open the Comp Off screen; Then each template is listed with its name, employee class specific flag, min hours and applicability

user_story: As an HR admin, I want to edit or view a comp off settings template, so that I can keep comp off thresholds accurate
acceptance_criteria: Given a comp off template is listed; When I click View or Edit and update the details; Then the changes are saved

user_story: As an HR admin, I want to save and continue to the next configuration step, so that I can complete the attendance setup flow
acceptance_criteria: Given I have configured comp off settings; When I click Save & Next; Then the settings are saved and I proceed to the next screen
